title: halimium atriplicifolium var. calycinum
intro: Halimium atriplicifolium var. calycinum, also known as rockrose, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of rockrose include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Rockrose can be prepared for herbal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
